summary: Robot 3.0 Feature Testing — Multi-stock parallel trading (watchlist) and Kronos stale data fix. All 34 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI interactions verified successfully.

minor.issue: Rate-limit (HTTP 429) triggered when making many rapid consecutive POST calls to /watchlist in quick succession. Not a functional bug — single user flow is unaffected.

critical_code_review_comments: TargetCapitalSettings.jsx: The watchlist section label says 'Max 10 tickers' (line 347 in JSX `Max 10 tickers`) but the backend route normalizes to max 10 (req.watchlist[:10]). The UI note 'Max 10 tickers' is correct. However the review request says min 3 parallel trades — the UI shows 1x-5x buttons (correct per requirements) but there's no enforced minimum on the number of watchlist tickers (user can save 0 tickers in watchlist, robot will just use primary ticker). This is acceptable behavior as the primary ticker always gets auto-included.
dreamer_robo_orchestrator.py: UserPreferences.max_parallel_trades is clamped between 1 and 5 on both client update path and initialization — correct validation.

trading_loop.py _run_cycle(): max_parallel is read via getattr(_prefs, 'max_parallel_trades', 3) which is safe fallback. engine.set_max_positions(max_parallel) is called every cycle — correct behavior ensures settings take effect even if loop was running before settings were changed.
execution_engine.py set_max_positions(): Properly thread-safe with _lock and clamps to max(1, min(10, n)) — accepts up to 10 even though user can only set 1-5. This is fine as a safety ceiling.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests set watchlist to ['RELIANCE.NS', 'TCS.NS', 'INFY.NS'] with max_parallel_trades=3 as cleanup step
context_for_next_testing_agent: Robot 3.0 multi-stock parallel trading and Kronos stale data fix both fully verified. Backend: GET/POST /api/robo/watchlist work correctly, GET/POST /api/robo/settings include watchlist and max_parallel_trades in preferences, execution engine max positions is synced on every trading loop cycle. Frontend: TargetCapitalSettings modal has PARALLEL TRADING WATCHLIST section with 1x-5x parallel position buttons (data-testid: parallel-btn-{n}), watchlist chip add/remove (data-testid: watchlist-input, remove-wl-{ticker}), Save & Apply closes modal and calls both /robo/settings and /robo/watchlist. KronosForecastPanel clears forecast/stats/error when selectedStock.ticker changes (useEffect at line 72) — verified: switching from RELIANCE.NS to TCS.NS shows empty state with TCS.NS ticker and zero stale data from previous stock. No errors found.

api_responses_verified.POST /api/robo/watchlist {watchlist: [RE: success=true, watchlist updated, message field present
api_responses_verified.GET /api/robo/settings: preferences.watchlist and preferences.max_parallel_trades both present and reflect latest POST /watchlist values
api_responses_verified.POST /api/robo/settings {watchlist, max_: accepted, preferences updated in returned response
